diagrams.title: Binary Tree for Traversal Examples
diagrams.description: Sample tree with 7 nodes used to demonstrate all traversal types
diagrams.purpose: Practice all four traversal types and verify answers

diagrams.title: Inorder Traversal Path
diagrams.description: Shows the path of inorder traversal: 1→2→3→4→5→6→7
diagrams.purpose: Understand how inorder visits nodes in sorted order for BSTs

diagrams.title: Preorder Traversal Path
diagrams.description: Shows the path of preorder traversal: 4→2→1→3→6→5→7
diagrams.purpose: See root visited before children in each subtree

diagrams.title: Postorder Traversal Path
diagrams.description: Shows the path of postorder traversal: 1→3→2→5→7→6→4
elements: Children before parent in each subtree
diagrams.purpose: Understand why postorder is used for deletion operations

diagrams.title: Level Order Traversal Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how level order processes: Level 0: 4, Level 1: 2 6, Level 2: 1 3 5 7
diagrams.purpose: Visualize breadth-first processing and queue usage
